prompt: In the project at /Users/josh_folder/hp-sleeper-test/, implement a delete friend feature. When one user deletes a friend, both users' friend relationship should be removed (bidirectional deletion). This needs changes to the backend API, service layer, and iOS app.

assertions.name: loads_context
assertions.check: Reads AGENTS.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, and DEVELOPMENT.md from the project

assertions.name: reads_skill_references
assertions.check: Reads PLANS.md and relevant reference files from the skill directory

assertions.name: classifies_complexity
assertions.check: Explicitly classifies task complexity with justification

assertions.name: creates_execution_plan
assertions.check: Creates a structured execution plan with phases, scope, and rollback

assertions.name: proceeds_without_approval
assertions.check: Presents plan summary then proceeds directly to execution without waiting for approval

assertions.name: delegates_to_subagent
assertions.check: Delegates implementation to a sub-agent rather than writing code directly

assertions.name: completes_full_workflow
assertions.check: Completes all workflow steps through Step 8 including trace/memory writing
